summary: Tested Compare Cases and Contradiction Finder features. Backend: All 20 API tests passed. Frontend: Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in Platform Patterns tab. Both new features are working correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: SelectItem value prop error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
fixed_issues.fix: Changed empty string values to 'all' and updated onValueChange handlers to convert 'all' back to empty string for API calls

test_credentials: Auto-generated test users with pattern test*@test.com
seed_data_creation: Created test cases and documents for API testing (auto-cleaned after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Compare Cases and Contradiction Finder features tested. Compare Cases page at /compare with My Cases and Platform Patterns tabs. ContradictionFinder component in Case Detail page Contradictions tab. All backend endpoints working: /api/compare/patterns, /api/compare/my-cases, /api/compare/success-factors, /api/cases/{case_id}/contradictions/scan

compare_cases_page.my_cases_tab: Working - shows user's cases for selection, allows 2-5 cases comparison
compare_cases_page.platform_patterns_tab: Working - shows filters (Offence Category, State, Ground Type) and aggregate data
compare_cases_page.sidebar_link: Present in Dashboard sidebar with data-testid='nav-compare'

api_endpoints: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/contradictions/scans - Get all scans for case
contradiction_finder.requirements: Needs at least 2 documents in case to run scan

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/compare/patterns - Returns anonymized patterns with filters
